title: Custom End Portal
description: Get access to and customise the shape of your end portal!
body:
# Overview
You can now create whatever shape you want for your end portal!

To support this in survival; the portal frame now has a recipe and can be mined, requires silk touch otherwise gives endstone. The direction of the frame blocks no longer matter.

<details>
<summary>Recipe</summary>

![Crafting Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6c74b381de4d9f7b2a860b9bd9dce2879d2a75bb.png)

</details>

If you have requests, feedback or if you experiance any issues feel free to inform me through the issue section on github.

Feel free to use this code however you wish.

Thanks and hope you enjoy!
